description: Arts of perception and foresight — sensing hidden truths, tracking prey, scrying distant places, and glimpsing what is yet to come.
abilities: Curious Case

Drawing upon past experience to investigate an overtly suspicious scene. By reflecting aloud on what seems familiar and connecting known details, a hidden clue is coaxed from the environment: perhaps the motive of a perpetrator, the location of a concealed message revealing someone's identity, or the likely destination of a person involved.
Delve

Producing a sound -- a clap, an animal call, anything that echoes -- that travels throughout an underground structure such as a cave system or dungeon. The reverberations map the general layout of the next several connected areas and the passageways between them, revealing major features like columns, bridges, and crevasses.
Diagnose

Extending one's senses through touch to identify a mysterious affliction such as a disease, spell, or curse. The nature of the malady reveals itself in fragments, rewarding careful deduction. Success depends on insight and persistence; partial clues emerge with each attempt, and once an affliction has been diagnosed, it can be recognized instantly in the future.
Evil Eye

Closing the eyes and quieting the mind to sense the worst thing that ever happened in the nearby area. The nature of the tragedy reveals itself along with impressions of those involved, whether it be a murder, a curse, or a dark vow once spoken in that place.
Find

Closing your eyes and reaching out with your mind to locate any object you have previously held, anywhere in your current world, discovering its exact position. With additional effort immediately afterward, you can recall the object — causing it to vanish from its present location and appear in your hands.
Impression

Brushing against a creature for a fleeting moment and feeling the pull of its desires. One specific, routine craving the creature harbors is revealed, but the magic comes at a cost: the caster becomes cursed to share that same craving and cannot use Impression again until the desire is fulfilled, at which point the curse lifts.
Insight

Gazing into the mind of a nearby creature to discover a prominent intention. The caster may learn something the creature intends to do imminently, something it plans to accomplish over a long stretch of time, or something it intends to do to a specific individual of the caster's choosing.
Magic Eye

Briefly gaining the ability to see beyond physical reality for the next hour. Magic becomes visible as a faint aura surrounding any person or object currently under an enchantment. Illusions slightly flicker, though their true forms remain hidden.
Nature's Watch

Extending the caster's senses for the next hour, choosing two of several heightened perceptions: aurasight, detecting a faint outline around anything currently affected by a spell; infrasight, sensing the heat signatures of warm-bodied creatures even through walls; darksight, seeing in nearby darkness as if it were dimly lit; mirrorsight, seeing around corners within enclosed spaces when standing at arm's reach of the bend; or realsight, detecting whether something is an illusion, causing detected illusions to flicker and waver.
Perfect Gift

Glimpsing the mind of a nearby creature to discover what stirs their heart, then conjuring an emotionally priceless gift for them. The caster chooses the gift's emotional effect: helping the creature come to terms with the loss of a loved one, inspiring them to repair a broken relationship, filling them with exuberant happiness for weeks, making them obsessively attached to the gift itself, or causing them to cherish the caster as an intimate friend and seek a closer bond. The form of the gift manifests to match the chosen effect and the creature's nature.
Prey Sense

Sharpening the caster's instinct for danger over the next hour, producing a subtle bodily signal -- rising hair, a tingle in the bones -- whenever a creature is about to threaten them, even one hidden from sight. Allies traveling with the caster cannot be ambushed while this sense is active; if a lurking creature is detected, the caster's companions act first.
Prophecy

Delving through time to glimpse the fate of another creature. This ability may only be used once in an entire lifetime, and the chosen prophecy must eventually come true. The invoker selects one destiny for the target: savior, fated to sacrifice their life trying to save someone or something; betrayer, destined to betray allies at a pivotal moment; leader, bound to acquire meaningful power and authority; disgraced, doomed to commit an act of such moral ruin that they become widely infamous; or paragon, destined for an act of such righteousness that they become widely renowned.
Read the Winds

Concentrating on the language of wind to sense weather patterns across the region, glimpsing a forecast for the coming days. At greater power, the caster chooses the weather that will arrive -- light rain, a thunderstorm, fog, a heat wave, or any seasonally appropriate pattern short of a natural disaster.
Ritual

Scavenging the area for a single dose of a magic edible found among the local plants. Upon ingesting it, the caster embarks on an inner journey lasting about an hour, gaining supernatural insight into one truth: the safest or fastest route to a destination, a place their nemesis visited within the past day, whether the surrounding reality is genuine or some kind of deception, or whether an ally is keeping a secret -- revealing who, but not what. The ritual can also serve as a gateway to astral journeys when undertaken alongside a companion who can open such paths.
Scry

Flashing forward in time to glimpse the near future. For a short period afterward, you can avert a single failure by rewriting the moment with a second chance, though you must accept the new outcome. Alternatively, you may peer ahead to sense an upcoming situation based on your current path — though the vision is hazy, like searching for detail in a watercolor painting.
See
Opening your eyes to perceive all magical deceptions for a time. Invisible things become visible, illusions reveal themselves, and anything altered by magic shows its true form.
Sense Magic

Feeling the presence of magic with increasing precision. At its most passive, a gentle tingling in your bones alerts you to nearby magical energy without revealing its location or nature. With mild focus, you discern the location and general nature of nearby magic — a cursed door, a magic weapon, an illusion. With deep concentration, you study magic in precise detail, learning its specific effects and identifying mysterious items by name and purpose.
Shadowseek

Projecting consciousness into a shadow plane to seek the location of a specific creature or object whose appearance is already known. At full power, the caster glimpses the target in real time, perceives its surroundings, and may even speak briefly into the target's mind, felt only as a faint breeze passing through them. Lesser successes yield a fleeting vision without certainty of when it occurred. Failure means wandering in darkness, and a catastrophic failure may reverse the scrying entirely, revealing the caster's own location to an enemy.
Size Up

Evaluating the capabilities of a nearby creature or group through keen observation. The assessment reveals useful insight into their strength, vulnerabilities, and resistances, and provides an accurate sense of whether they would pose a fair fight. The knowledge manifests as narrative intuition: a flinch at the sight of flame, a favoring of one side, a telltale hesitation.
Soul Gaze

Peering into the eyes of a nearby creature with eyes turned black like shimmering gateways to eternity, momentarily transfixing the target. A successful gaze reveals the creature's deepest ideal and most damning flaw, and may even uncover the best and worst things they have ever done. A partial success yields ideals and flaws but risks false readings, while a failed attempt lets the target resist and briefly glimpse the caster's own recent thoughts.
Track

Reading the ground with an expert eye, instantly identifying the type of creature that left any discovered tracks and recalling known facts about the animal's habits and temperament. At greater power, the caster can pick up the trail of a chosen type of animal native to the current environment even with no visible tracks, locating one after a short search.
Transcendence

Entering a profound trance that expands your consciousness to touch every sentient being across a vast area. For a brief, staggering moment you absorb the simultaneous experiences of countless minds, perceiving time and identity at a scale far beyond mortal comprehension. This communion can reveal deep truths — the hidden history of a people, the location of a secret artifact, the identity of the most powerful being in the land — so long as the knowledge sought could reasonably be glimpsed through the eyes of others. The request must be focused; no single mind can hold everything. And beware: entering the minds of others is never without risk.
Wild Aspect

Channeling the spirit of a wild creature into oneself or nearby allies. Eagle: gaining raptor-sharp vision for a brief time, seeing anything in the line of sight with perfect clarity and detecting faraway movement invisible to ordinary eyes. Cat: purring softly to imbue several nearby creatures with feline darksight for the next hour, allowing them to see in complete darkness as though in a dimly lit room -- though the enchantment cannot pierce magical darkness, and affected creatures may occasionally feel the urge to stop and groom themselves. Wolf: howling to imbue several nearby creatures with lupine haste for the next hour, granting them the speed to outrun any other creature on foot.
